title: Iran War Live Updates: Iraq Closes Oil Terminals as Energy Prices Surge
summary_full: Two oil tankers were burning off the Iraqi coast on Thursday as the conflict in the Middle East deepened disruptions to the global energy supply. Israeli airstrikes also shook Beirut, the Lebanese capital.
